name: Stewed Fish a La Juive
recipeIngredient: 3 lb carp, pike or salmon, cut into 1-inch steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring parsley, onions, and water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add white pepper, nutmeg, matzah meal, saffron, and lemon juice.
4. Place fish pieces, head, tail, and steaks in the water, adding more if needed.
5. Cover and poach for 10-15 minutes or until cooked.
6. Remove steaks to a platter, arranging them in the original fish shape.
7. Leave head and tail in the broth.
8. Reduce broth by half over high heat, cooking about 15 minutes.
9. Adjust seasoning and strain.
10. Return broth to pot, add egg yolks, whisking well, and bring just to a boil.
11. Chill overnight.
12. Remove head and tail from broth and arrange with fish steaks.
13. Refrigerate overnight.
14. Garnish with onions, parsley, and reduced broth.
15. Serve fish at room temperature with remaining broth in separate bowl.
